name: teacher-work-datahub
summary: Workspace-scoped teacher-work datahub for traceable teacher allocation, timetable, and teaching-progress workflows, with indexes, active source arbitration, query entrypoints, receipts, and health checks. Best suited for private/incubating distribution rather than zero-config public use.
author: lvxiaoer
release_positioning: workspace-scoped private/incubating skill; not zero-config public
